mapper.select: SELECT id, expense_type AS expenseType, amount, expense_date AS expenseDate, description, registered_by AS registeredBy, created_at AS createdAt FROM expenses ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE expenses SET expense_type = #{expenseType}, amount = #{amount}, expense_date = #{expenseDate}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.employee_id AS employeeId, p.pay_year AS payYear, p.pay_month AS payMonth, p.work_hours AS workHours, p.base_pay AS basePay, p.deduction, p.net_pay AS netPay, p.paid_at AS paidAt, p.note, p.created_at AS createdAt, e.name AS employeeName FROM payrolls p LEFT JOIN employees e ON p.employee_id = e.id ORDER BY p.pay_year DESC, p.pay_month DESC, p.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE payrolls SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, pay_year = #{payYear}, pay_month = #{payMonth}, work_hours = #{workHours}, base_pay = #{basePay}, deduction = #{deduction}, net_pay = #{netPay}, paid_at = #{paidAt}, note = #{note} WHERE id = #{id}
